page.title: Teams
page.bannerTitle: A group of assistants, working together
page.bannerDescription: Let multiple assistants divide the work and move complex tasks forward together.

empty.title: No teams yet
empty.description: Use New team to choose members, select a collaboration mode, and save your setup.

clear.title: Clear sessions
clear.description: Clear all team sessions for "{{name}}"? Members and configuration will be kept so you can start again. This cannot be undone.

delete.title: Delete team
delete.description: Delete "{{name}}"? The team and all of its sessions will be removed. This cannot be undone.

errors.minMembers: A team needs at least 2 members

description.label: Team description
description.placeholder: Describe what this team is good at

mode.label: Collaboration mode
mode.leaderDescription: Centralized orchestration where members hand off or finish through control tools. Best for complex project execution.
mode.equalDescription: Equal exploration where members branch out, hand off, or converge through control tools. Best for brainstorming and direction finding.

members.label: Team members (from built-in and installed assistants)
members.empty: No assistants available. Create or install one on the Assistants page first.

leader.label: Leader (choose from selected members)
leader.empty: Select at least one member first

systemPrompt.label: Team system prompt
systemPrompt.placeholder: Define collaboration goals, roles, and boundaries for the team. This is added to every member's system prompt.

skills.label: Team skills (available to everyone, even if a member has not enabled them)

chat.emptyHintLeader: the leader will coordinate members to finish it
chat.emptyHintEqual: members will explore as equals and hand off with control tools
chat.emptyMessage: Start a task for the team, and {{hint}}.
chat.guidancePlaceholder: Enter guidance; it will be added to the ongoing collaboration
chat.composerPlaceholder: Describe a task, use / for skills, @ for files, or choose members to direct speech

alerts.guidanceNoAttachmentsMessage: While a team task is running, you can only send text guidance. Wait for the task to finish before sending a new message with attachments.
alerts.steerFailedMessage: The team task has just finished. Send it again as a new message.

empty.todos: Team todos will appear here while tasks run
empty.noSessionDir: Session file directory does not exist
